title: calyptridium monandrum
intro: Calyptridium monandrum, also known as mountain king cup or mountain mariposa, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of western North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. The plant's extracts have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, contributing to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
